plugins.name: nostr-skills
plugins.description: Nostr protocol skills — direct Nostr interaction via nak CLI, Marmot Protocol (MLS+Nostr group messaging), remote signing (NIP-46 bunkers, NIP-07, NIP-55, key management), and cross-language SDK selection across nostr-tools, NDK, rust-nostr, fiatjaf.com/nostr, nostr-java, nostr4j, nostr-sdk-jvm, nostr-sdk-ios, nostr-sdk-swift, and pynostr.

plugins.name: aws-skills
plugins.description: AWS deployment skills — serverless CloudFront distributions with S3 origins, Pulumi IaC, Lambda@Edge authentication, cache policies, invalidation strategies, and static site hosting patterns.

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: AI agent design expertise — architecture patterns, loop architectures, memory systems, and task systems. Four specialist agents with persistent knowledge bases covering 13+ frameworks, 8+ loop patterns, 7+ memory architectures, and 6+ task decomposition strategies.

plugins.name: base
plugins.description: Feature and bug workflow orchestration using agent teams — language-agnostic TDD, story-based implementation with crash recovery, evidence-based verification, configurable quality gates, and cross-environment dev troubleshooting (host + VM sharing one project tree).

plugins.name: pwa-react-skills
plugins.description: PWA and React expertise — service workers, caching strategies, offline support, Workbox, Web App Manifest, push notifications, Core Web Vitals, React 19+ (Server Components, Actions, Compiler), state management, testing, accessibility, UX patterns, and modern build tooling.

plugins.name: reference-skills
plugins.description: Reference project tracking and knowledge accumulation — track GitHub repos relevant to your project, progressively build knowledge about their architecture, APIs, patterns, and evolution, and get answers grounded in accumulated reference knowledge.
